name: engineering-workflow
description: Personal engineering workflow skills for Codex: operating defaults, requirements alignment, lightweight planning, agent dispatch, TDD, debugging, design alternatives, review, finishing, and compounded learnings.

interface.shortDescription: Codex operating defaults, alignment, planning, dispatch, TDD, debugging, review, and finishing.
interface.longDescription: A personal engineering workflow plugin that packages reusable Codex skills for correctness-first development: requirements alignment before non-trivial edits, lightweight durable planning for long tasks, standing-policy subagent dispatch, test-driven behavior changes, systematic debugging, parallel design-space exploration, subagent review, honest finishing, and durable session learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Use engineering workflow for this task.
Use subagents when dispatch triggers hit.
Use a planning ledger for long-running work.
Explore design alternatives for this interface.
Compound durable learnings from this session.
